title: Measure length in different units
description: Practice measuring items in 2 different units and compare the size of units.

assessment_items.question_content:
The length of a rectangle is measured in jumbo paper clips and in centimeters.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ced82a8c127035ba0408eb485105e33a2af671b)

**The rectangle is [[☃ numeric-input 3]] jumbo paperclips long.**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/625a0f3a201c3b42715aa056d1c0c466e261ce31)

**The rectangle is [[☃ numeric-input 4]] centimeters long.**
hints: Let's measure the length of the rectangle in jumbo paperclips and centimeters.

The rectangle starts at the beginning of $1$ jumbo paperclip and ends after $2$ jumbo paper clips.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c35462ccaa23ada221889f275f541a650857a92a)

The length of the rectangle is $2$ jumbo paperclips.

On the ruler, the rectangle starts at $0\text{  cm}$ and ends at $3\text{ cm}$. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/686c9df16f266ddfcc4b3122810a31d23276e2c4)

The length of the rectangle is $3$ centimeters.
The length of the rectangle is $2$ jumbo paperclips and $3$ centimeters.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/43adad29c6f8dbf3cfc4302b0258e2097e32a7ef)

assessment_items.question_content:
The length of a rectangle is measured in small paperclips and in centimeters.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e6f49e9a9807f40b95d9785d6f0ff3d91cc52db6)

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c104228ce3ce5128aea1d65b478dd76b78efee32)

**Which unit of measure is longer?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Does it take more small paperclips or more centimeters to measure the length of the rectangle?
It takes more small paperclips to measure the rectangle than it takes centimeters.

Since we need more small paperclips to measure the length of the rectangle, one small  paperclip must  be shorter than one centimeter.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ac6426eca8d72f2ee5f535f34e95d735eb8ff64c)
**One centimeter** is the longer unit.

**One paperclip** is the longer unit.
